findings.finding: All adapters follow stateless function pattern; command orchestrates; view only reads models. Service-layer boundaries respected.
29 new tests covering B1-B4 all pass. Full suite: 86/87 pass (1 pre-existing failure unrelated to Phase B).
No hardcoded secrets. API keys passed as params, read from env only at command entry. .env.example contains only placeholders.
MAJOR_CITIES list hardcoded (73 cities). Adding cities requires code change. --file option provides workaround.
composite_score weights hardcoded in model property. Not configurable without code change.
BLS fetch_employment_growth imports datetime inside function; makes testing with fixed years harder.
market_data.py line 179: comps fallback calls get_comps_for_listing inside except handler without its own try/except. Unrelated to Phase B.
